caption: A woman with her hair in a high, curly bun wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio. She is smiling and looking slightly to her left. In front of her is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall featuring a screen displaying the text "ohnson" in red and blue, and a sign that reads "Employees Only". To her right is a black sound-absorbing panel bordered by a yellow stripe. On-screen graphics appear in the lower portion of the frame, including a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a static position, maintaining her smile and gaze, with virtually no movement or change in the scene, creating a consistent visual of her participating in a recorded session.
